transcript.speaker: actor
transcript.message: Hi, thanks for your message. Are you working at the moment and when would you be looking to move?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.message: I’m currently a university lecturer based in Nottingham and looking to move as soon as possible. Would it be possible to arrange a viewing sometime this week?

transcript.speaker: actor
transcript.message: Thanks. I still need to know your work situation and move date before sharing contact details.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.message: I’m a full-time university lecturer, so my work is stable. I’m hoping to move within the next couple of weeks. Could we arrange a viewing to discuss further?

transcript.speaker: actor
transcript.message: How about Saturday at 2pm?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.message: Saturday at 2pm works well for me. Could you please share a contact number so we can coordinate on the day?

transcript.speaker: actor
transcript.message: Yes, that works for me. You can call me on 07123456789 this evening to arrange the viewing.
